name: Molly Shannon
blurb: Creator of the gawky Catholic-schoolgirl Mary Katherine Gallagher.
bio: Molly Shannon is an American comedian and actress who was a Saturday Night Live cast member from 1995 to 2001, best known for the exuberant character Mary Katherine Gallagher. She has since built an acclaimed film and television career.

bits.t: Mary Katherine Gallagher Wants to Join a Gang
